name: 3M™ Acetone Resistant Label Material 76962, 975mm, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Chemical Resistant Polyester Label Material 76962 is a 50 micron, matt white thermal transfer printable labelstock that offers excellent resistance to organic solvents such as acetone, MEK and toluene.
benefits: Topcoat provides excellent resistance of the thermal transfer image to organic solvents including acetone, MEK and toluene. Optimum durability may be achieved when printing with Ricoh B110CU thermal transfer ribbon
350E is 3M’s most universal labelstock adhesive and offers excellent adhesion, even on low surface energy substrates, combined with excellent temperature and chemical resistance
46 micron adhesive coat weight gives excellent adhesion to textured surfaces

discovery.title: 3M™ Acetone Resistant Label Material 76962, 975mm, Roll, Config
